_README: TEMPLATE — copy to config.<client>-<market>.json (gitignored) for per-client defaults. Then a fixed command runs everything: node tools/report-fetcher/run.mjs all --config <this>. All fields optional; any can be passed as a --flag instead. marketplace = lowercase country code (us, de, it, uk, ...). See README.md.

sqp._comment: One entry per ASIN group. Each group => one combined CSV (rows tagged by ASIN — a valid inputs.sqp_csvs group file), or one file per ASIN when split=true. Each ASIN is fetched with a single-ASIN call (uncapped SV). reporting_range: weekly|monthly|quarterly. period_end_dates: period-END dates YYYY-MM-DD (weekly = week-ending Saturday; monthly/quarterly = last day of the period), America/Los_Angeles.

business_report._comment: legacy_report_id: 102:DetailSalesTrafficByChildItem (child ASIN — default) | ...ByParentItem | ...BySKU | 102:SalesTrafficTimeSeries. asins optional (omit/[] for all child ASINs).

scp._comment: Brand Catalog Performance. brand = brand id (from Brand Analytics); asins optional. Standalone CSV (not consumed by the audit builders).

tst._comment: Top Search Terms. Optional brand / search_term / asins filters. Standalone CSV.
